methods.description: Isolation experiments to obtain pure cultures of Burkholderiales and Flavobacteriales from methane-oxidizing communities, using frozen cultures and new cultures inoculated with frozen sediment.

steps.description: Utilized frozen cultures from prior experiments and established new cultures inoculated with frozen sediment under high-and low-dioxygen conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: use frozen cultures and establish new cultures with sediment under varying oxygen conditions

steps.description: Dilutions of the resulting cultures were plated onto R2A agar plates and incubated at room temperature for up to 2 weeks.
steps.searchable_summary: plate culture dilutions on R2A agar and incubate

steps.description: Colonies were examined for shape and color, and representatives were purified through serial transfers onto the same medium.
steps.searchable_summary: examine and purify colonies by serial transfers

steps.description: DNA was isolated, and 16S rRNA genes were sequenced.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate DNA and sequence 16S rRNA genes

steps.description: Strains that appeared most distinct in their phenotypes/genotypes were chosen for further genomic/phenotypic analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: select distinct strains for genomic analysis

methods.description: Investigation of dynamics in pure cultures and cocultures by mixing species at equal optical densities and incubating under specific conditions.

steps.description: Species were mixed in different combinations based on equal optical density at 600 nm (OD 600) values.
steps.searchable_summary: mix species at equal OD 600 values

steps.description: Cells were collected and resuspended in NMS medium.
Microcosms were incubated under NMS or AMS medium with a 25% methane/75% air headspace atmosphere.
OD 600 measurements were carried out every 4 to 6 h.
Cell numbers were determined by flow cytometry.
steps.searchable_summary: determine cell numbers using flow cytometry

methods.description: Analysis of DNA from cocultures using stable isotope probing and sequencing to determine population dynamics.

steps.description: Cocultures were grown in NMS medium with 25% 13C-labeled methane/75% air in the headspace.
DNA was extracted using the MPBio FastDNA Spin kit for soil.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using MPBio FastDNA Spin kit

steps.description: Heavy (13C-enriched) DNA fractions were separated by CsCl-SYBR green dye density gradient ultracentrifugation.
DNA was sequenced and data were analyzed using standard pipelines.

methods.description: Analysis of transcriptomic changes over time in cocultures under hypoxic conditions.

steps.description: Cocultures were grown in NMS medium with 25% methane/75% air in the headspace.
Samples were flushed with dinitrogen and supplemented with methane to create hypoxic conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: create hypoxic conditions with dinitrogen and methane

steps.description: Total RNA was extracted and transcript sequencing was carried out.
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA and perform transcript sequencing

steps.description: Trimmed reads were mapped to reference data sets and transcript abundances were calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: map reads to reference and calculate transcript abundances
